## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu discussion on SID content strategy and AI-assisted content creation techniques.](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current article lacks sufficient SID mentions; needs rework to prominently feature SID throughout](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [ChatGPT with custom prompts and context can effectively generate SID-centric content](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Integrations and features should be strategically mentioned and linked in articles](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Experimentation with AI prompts is key to achieving optimal content results](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

## Topics

### SID Content Strategy

  - [Current article doesn't mention SID enough; only in conclusion](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Need to relate all headings back to SID](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Client wants SID mentioned "wherever possible"](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Emphasis on SID features, integrations, and blog links throughout](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

### AI-Assisted Content Creation

  - [Using Team Plus Pod GPT account for better results](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Custom channel created with specific SID context and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [AI context from Lotion can be copied and pasted for more accurate outputs](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Prompt structure: "Here's more context on SID" + integrations list + features list](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Additional prompt: "When creating outlines, keep in mind these integrations and features relate to the topic"](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

### ChatGPT Techniques

  - [Experimenting with multiple outline attempts for best results](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Refining prompts: "This is very SID-focused. Can you make it more general? But mention SID along with implications and features wherever possible."](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Reminding ChatGPT of SID integrations and features if it stops mentioning them](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

### Content Optimization

  - [Balancing general information with SID-specific mentions](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Incorporating SID's strongest selling points (e.g., native integrations with Slack and Microsoft Teams)](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Using interlinking suggestions provided by AI](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Manually adding links to SID integration and feature pages during editing](https://fathom.video/share/DGy4pZRSnSdzjhK2TfkPoA2ENzyaEH9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
